title: ExtraMusicDiscs
description: Adds many music discs with music from various artists.
body:
This mod adds music discs with music from various artists to the game. Do you love the jukebox and want more variety? Then this mod is for you!

Artists from which music is currently in the mod:

  • Chiru-san - YouTube - 19 Songs
  • Glitch Cat - YouTube - 9 Songs

While at the moment there aren't many artists within the mod, I am looking to increase upon that number.

Unfortunately many artists don't just state somewhere if you are allowed to use their music or not, which is a risk I am not willing to take.

I am open to, and interested in hearing any suggestions you may have!

 

Planned future features

  • LootTables so that you can find the discs in chests.
  • Crafting Recipes
  • More music discs with music from more artists.
